runtime_translation.fallback_interactive_setup: Ask concise direct questions when the structured tool is unavailable
runtime_translation.command_surface: Plain-text commands and the wrapper CLI preserve the Claude slash-command grammar

autoresearch.label: autoresearch
autoresearch.description: Core autonomous loop. Modify, verify, keep or discard, repeat.

plan.label: autoresearch:plan
plan.description: Goal-to-config wizard for Scope, Metric, Direction, Verify, and Guard.

debug.label: autoresearch:debug
debug.description: Scientific bug-hunting loop with falsifiable hypotheses and iterative experiments.

fix.label: autoresearch:fix
fix.description: Atomic one-fix-per-iteration repair loop for tests, types, lint, or build.

security.label: autoresearch:security
security.description: STRIDE plus OWASP security audit with red-team exploration.

ship.label: autoresearch:ship
ship.description: Universal shipping workflow for code, deployments, content, research, and other artifacts.

scenario.label: autoresearch:scenario
scenario.description: Scenario-driven use case generator across happy path, edge, failure, abuse, and scale dimensions.

predict.label: autoresearch:predict
predict.description: Multi-persona prediction and debate workflow before acting on a codebase.

learn.label: autoresearch:learn
learn.description: Codebase documentation engine for init, update, check, and summarize flows.

reason.label: autoresearch:reason
reason.description: Adversarial refinement loop with generation, critique, synthesis, and blind judging.
